# CODING STANDARDS

## Naming

Classes: PascalCase
Methods: PascalCase
Fields: _camelCase
Parameters: camelCase

## Nullability

* Enable nullable reference types
* Mark optional refs nullable explicitly

## Formatting

* One public class per file
* XML docs for public APIs if project uses them

## Async

* Async methods suffix with Async

## Comments

* Avoid redundant comments
* Comment only non-obvious logic
